steps.title: Read the first two segments
steps.content: The graph first increases in a straight line for $1$ hour, meaning constant speed away from home. Then it is flat for $4$ hours, meaning Quinidra stayed at the location.

steps.title: Read the final segment
steps.content: The final straight segment decreases back to $0$ distance from home, so she drove back home at a constant speed. This matches all three parts of the model. The answer is B.
